case_title: JEANNE MAZERIS VS. REBECCA KORBET et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAZERIS, JEANNE TRUSTEE FOR THE F & J MAZERIS 1997 TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT KORBET, REBECCA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAZERIS, JEANNE TRUSTEE FOR THE F & J MAZERIS 1997 TRUST
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT KORBET, REBECCA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAZERIS, JEANNE TRUSTEE FOR THE F & J MAZERIS 1997 TRUST SERVED OCT-27-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KORBET, REBECCA
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $54.26 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAZERIS, JEANNE TRUSTEE FOR THE F & J MAZERIS 1997 TRUST
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KORBET, REBECCA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KORBET, REBECCA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 800 BUSH ST. # 701 S.F. CA, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
